content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Addressed two pending amendments: (1) Added validate_classification_fields() function that inspects a serde_json::Value for cross-variant field contamination. Serde internally tagged enums cannot use deny_unknown_fields, so this JSON-level check detects payloads like {"classification":"fix-now",...,"mapped_to_bead_id":"x"} that would silently discard cross-variant fields during deserialization. Defines allowed field sets per variant and reports each unexpected field. (2) Added remediation_hint validation in the FixNow arm: Some("") and whitespace-only hints are now rejected. Added 13 new tests.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Confirmed serde limitation: deny_unknown_fields is not supported with internally tagged enums (#[serde(tag = "...")]). Verified no existing codebase patterns solve this at the serde level.
2. [Completed] Added validate_classification_fields() function taking &serde_json::Value. Defines FIX_NOW_FIELDS, PLANNED_ELSEWHERE_FIELDS, PROPOSE_NEW_BEAD_FIELDS constants. Reads the classification tag, looks up allowed fields, reports any key not in the allowed set.
3. [Completed] Added remediation_hint validation: when Some, checks trim().is_empty() and reports error 'must not be empty or whitespace-only when present'.
4. [Completed] Added 13 new tests: 4 for remediation_hint (empty string rejected, whitespace-only rejected, None accepted, valid hint accepted), 9 for cross-variant field detection (leaked mapped_to_bead_id on fix-now, leaked proposed_title on planned-elsewhere, leaked confidence on propose-new-bead, multiple cross-variant fields all reported, clean JSON for all 3 variants passes, unknown classification variant rejected, non-object JSON rejected)
5. [Completed] Ran cargo fmt (applied minor formatting), verified cargo fmt --check clean, ran full test suite: 758 passed 0 failed (58 review_classification tests, all green)

## Validation Evidence

- 58/58 review_classification tests pass (45 prior + 13 new): fix_now_rejects_empty_remediation_hint, fix_now_rejects_whitespace_only_remediation_hint, fix_now_accepts_none_remediation_hint, fix_now_accepts_valid_remediation_hint, cross_variant_field_on_fix_now_is_rejected, cross_variant_field_on_planned_elsewhere_is_rejected, cross_variant_field_on_propose_new_bead_is_rejected, multiple_cross_variant_fields_all_reported, clean_fix_now_json_passes_field_validation, clean_planned_elsewhere_json_passes_field_validation, clean_propose_new_bead_json_passes_field_validation, unknown_classification_variant_is_rejected, non_object_json_is_rejected
- Full suite: 758 passed, 0 failed across lib tests (752), integration tests (174+1), and doc-tests
- cargo fmt --check passes with no diffs
- Cross-variant contamination is caught at JSON level since serde deny_unknown_fields is incompatible with internally tagged enums

## Outstanding Risks

- Pre-existing clippy warnings (19) in other modules remain; not introduced by this change
- validate_classification_fields must be called explicitly on raw JSON before or alongside validate_classification — it is not automatically invoked during deserialization
